text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide<n>both fail to win
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This loss and the difficulties she<n>faced in training
weigh heavily on<n>Narita Taishin, and she breaks
from<n>mental and physical exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a<n>break from both
training and racing.
